summary: Project Timeline & Milestones feature (Phase 7, Part 5) fully tested. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified Timeline tab in LeadDetailModal and read-only timeline in ClientPortal. All features working correctly.

seed_data_creation: Existing milestones used: First Look Preview (completed), Album Design (pending). Key dates set: Apr 15 (shoot), Apr 25 (edit), May 5 (delivery)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project Timeline feature is complete. The Timeline tab shows in LeadDetailModal with flag icon. Creatives can: view key dates (Shoot Day, Editing Deadline, Final Delivery with 'Key Date' badge), add custom milestones, mark milestones complete/undo, delete milestones. Clients see read-only timeline in portal (no edit/delete buttons). Completion counter shows '1/2 done' format.

backend_apis.POST /api/leads/:id/milestones: PASSED - Creates milestone with name, description, dueDate
backend_apis.PATCH /api/leads/milestones/:id: PASSED - Updates milestone fields including completed toggle
backend_apis.PATCH /api/leads/:id/timeline: PASSED - Sets key dates (shootingDate, editingDeadline, deliveryDate)
backend_apis.GET /api/portal/:token/timeline: PASSED - Returns timeline for client (public, no auth)

frontend_ui.Key dates display: PASSED - Shoot Day, Editing Deadline, Final Delivery with 'Key Date' badge
frontend_ui.Milestone display: PASSED - Shows name, description, due date
frontend_ui.Completed milestone styling: PASSED - Green with checkmark, completion date
frontend_ui.Add Milestone form: PASSED - Name, date, description inputs with save/cancel
frontend_ui.Client portal timeline: PASSED - Read-only view, no edit/delete buttons
